---
title: The Future of RSS
author: RandomPeerB
date: 2024-02-26
description: RSS never died — it just went underground
tags: ["#rss", "#openweb"]
---
RSS never died — it just went underground. While social media captured mainstream attention, RSS quietly continued serving millions.

The resurgence of newsletters and indie blogs is bringing RSS back into the spotlight. Combine it with P2P distribution and you have unstoppable content syndication.
